records.pMessage: My contract ends here. I’ll take my leave.
What!? Chief, I don’t… I don’t understand!
Your odds are poor, and I don’t take poor clients.
Go, then! They all abandon me in the end!
A fitting end… Everything…taken away. So…thirsty…
Our agreement ends here. This is what your money buys.
What!? I’ve paid you a small fortune!
Any further, and I’ll be placing my life on the line.
That bears a surcharge of 51.2 billion pg.
Zat’s not a surcharge, it’s a national budget! You’re mad!
Then this is farewell. Best of luck.
Zis… Zis is fraud! I’ll see you reported for zis!
M-money… All my money…! My…glkh…
What, you aren’t running this time?
A contract is a contract.
…And many’s the coin I earned under the king’s auspices.
It’s not in my nature, but I’m prepared to die for this one!

Hngh… Very well.
Only fitting that money should be my end.

My goal is met. I’ve no reason to…earn another coin.
No reason…
Khint! This isn’t happening… Is there no one else!?
I’ll give my throne to no one… No one…!
Ah ha ha! Ah ha ha ha ha ha!

They’re like little dolls.
One good twist, and off pops their head!
You are ever demanding of your toys, Victoria.
They’d been apart half a lifetime, and just finally…
Have you no humanity!?
Victor, were we to bring back the vestals, plural?
No, Victoria. We were charged with securing only one.
Then I think I’ll go ahead and kill the wind vestal.
Yes, that sounds rather lovely.
Were these my father’s orders!?
Hmm? Ah, it’s the grand marshal’s girl.
I was too distracted by the vestals to notice.

Has my father truly performed such brutality
all this time!?

Quiet your wailing.
He was calm enough when he cast you off.
Indeed, I see no issue with terminating her here.
I grow bored, Victor.
Then shall we conclude?
Ha ha, erase all but the water vestal.
The rest ar…argh…nng…nhh!
…!? Victoria? Victoria!
Nhh…ahh…nh…aah…aaagh!!
Of course it would have to be now…
I fear we must adjourn. My apologies!
…Did we win?
No, they let us…go?
Artemia…prey…
Sister…

Since you’re clearly incapable of managing
my nickname…
Let’s make this formal.

I am captain of the Eternian Forces’
Bloodrose Legion—
Red Mage Fiore DeRosa!
Sp-sp-splendid!
You dumb—I told you to stand firm…not to…
You, a mere vestal, dare hinder my every move!
Your early years may be tragic indeed!
But I cannot forgive what you’ve done!
You stole the life of a dear friend from me!
Hmph, vengeance? I can relate to that.
I’ve no interest in the grand marshal’s fancy ideals.

But we do agree on one thing—
the need to crush the Orthodoxy.
Total annihilation would be too easy on them!
They’ll all pay for what they did to me!
Ugh… I wish you…I wish you’d all drop dead.
Victoria…? Victoria!
Forgive me…Victoria.
Fool. I didn’t say you could die before me.
Unh, Victor… Victor, where are you?
R-right here…by your side.
I just wanted to say…I really hate you.
But now, finally, I’m free. Free of this pain.
No, I will not let you go.
Fine, I suppose there’s no getting rid of you.
Th-thank you, Victoria. Sweet Victoria…
You wouldn’t let me die, though I suffered so.
If I’m to die, my soul… It shall join you.
I couldn’t possibly go on without Victor…
It’s better this way. Now I can finally die…finally.

Not that I was that fond of him,
but I did need his treatments.
Heh heh, I am in your debt.
I now go to be by Victoria’s side.
You grant me the gift of death.
Ha ha ha… Sweet Victoria. Sweet, sweet Vic…
I am Braev Lee, the Templar…
…Grand Marshal of Eternia! Prepare for battle!
You shall not pass.
You shall not pass!
…Hrgh.
You have grown strong, my daughter.

This ship will tumble out of control
if we don’t do something!

This ship shall go crashing down along
with all on board!
[PCF2]!
You know not the Lord Marshal’s mind!
We’ve already settled the matter between us!
You have no business interfering now!
Settled the matter? Nothing has been settled!
All you have is a false sense of understanding.
Wind Vestal! I should have killed you long ago.

You have become the bane of Eternia…
Nay, all the world!
Never again shall you deceive [PCF2]!
I’ve no interest in your foul, twisted beliefs.
It is my sworn task to save the world from ruin.
And I shall not fall before my task is done!
Open your eyes, [PCF2]!
These traitorous scum have deceived you!
Join me now in defeating the vestal!
How could you say such a thing!?
[PCF1] has become a dear friend of mine.
Rgh!
Grandship’s pitching even worse now!
She won’t hold up much longer!
In the foul, reeking underslums of Florem…
…I survived on muddied waters and gritty sands.

But what choice does one have
when abandoned soon after birth!?

Hatred for this accursed world
had been my sustenance.
That is, until the grand marshal saved me!
He took me in and raised me as if I were his own!

To help him fulfill his ideals became my purpose…
my will to live!
And now, you fools…you have…!
Can we not go back to as before, [PCF2]?

Did we not grow up together!?
Did we not enjoy the closeness of family!?
I…I had thought that once I had proven myself…
…perhaps I would…would take you as my bride!

Don’t be a fool!
Now’s not the time for such rubbish!
Rubbish…? …Arrrgh!!
Waugh! D-d-dragon!
Here it comes!
Waugh! Dr-dr-dragon!
Here it comes!
Waugh! Dr-dr-dragon!
Here it comes!
Waugh! Dr-dr-dragon!
Here it comes!
Waugh! Dr-dr-dragon!
Here it comes!
Waugh! Dr-dr-dragon!
Here it comes!
H-how can this be?
The immortal Lester DeRosso has been defeated?
Do you know that fairy’s true objective?
She intends to let the power of the crystals run wild!
You have all fallen for her ruse.
That includes you, Wind Vestal!
Awakening the crystals will not save the world!
On the contrary, it shall bring the world to ruin!
I heard this from the grand marshal himself!

Our true enemy is not the wind vestal,
but the cryst-fairy!
But it is written in the scriptures!

Cryst-fairies guide the vestals from the path
of danger.
They are the embodiment of the crystals’ light!
Clearly deceptions fabricated by the Orthodoxy!

If you’ve come to finish the job you started,
you’re in for a surprise!
You forget, I’m a skilled white mage. Hah!
I have already healed our wounds completely!
Never underestimate your elders!
Ha ha haaa! I’m back in action!
Feel my fists of rage!
Gwah… I guess this is the end…of the line…
These muscles of steel…failed me…
You’ve got to be kidding me, Barras!
What are you doing? Stand up!
Get on your feet and roar like you always do!
I can’t get into my rhythm otherwise!
… You worthless worm… What a dolt…

There’s nothing worse than a man
who lets women down…
Gah… You got…me…
H-Holly! Oh, son of a…!
I would tell you to calm down…
But I don’t think you’re capable of it.
Without me, who will heal your wounds?
You must flee, and find another…partner…
Don’t say that!
You are the only one I need, Holly!
I won’t let anyone else touch me!
Hmph. You dunderhead. Thanks…anyway…
Gah… No… I’m not…done…yet…
Yarrgh!
Nothing fazes these…muscles of steel!
St-steel…
How could you…do this to your elder…?
What cruel…brats…
All that showing off…
You really…make me…sick…
What is with you people!? Stay away from me!
It’s just not right! The cheek of it!
Do you d-despise me that much!?
I-it was all your fault, anyway!
Yeah, that’s it. You’re the ones to blame!
I…did nothing…wrong…
Your father judged you to have come of age!

That is why he assigned you to the Eternian
Sky Knights!
But you throw it back in his face! For shame!
Gah… My sword was not up to the task…
Need a hand, Jackal?
Ah, chief. Perfect timing!
The usual fee, then?
Heh, no problem!
Cripes… If only I could see…one last time…
Not…my parents… The boss…
Need some assistance, Profiteur?
Is zis not obvious!?
I trust I will be compensated?

You shall be richly rewarded.
Make sure none survive!

Then we have a deal.
Your money will be well spent.
Kill ze little pests!
Gold… Zat is all you need…
It buys status, fame, anything…
So, you’re staying put this time!?
Such a reward is worth taking a few risks.

I must earn my keep by holding up
my end of the bargain.
Grr… Just a bit…more…
Still…the money has been…worth it…

Yeah, we know.
Captain of the Bloodrose Legion—
The Red Mage, Old Man DeRosa!
Whoa, hold on there…
Hah, it is the Susano-o I sought!
Look at that beast! Such awesome power!
I thank you for this gesture. Gah hah hah!
What do you mean, I disgust you!?
I don’t remember doing anything to you!
Ah ha ha, but of course you don’t.

You have your health,
and blood relatives that care for you deeply.

You live a life of comfort,
with many friends and teachers…
Any yet despite these blessings, you rebelled.
How can you display such arrogance, [PCF2]!?
I find your very existence offensive!
I…I fail to see how that is justified…

Is that right?
You have no concept of the suffering of us have-nots!
Justified or not, I despise you!
Why don’t you just roll over and die now!?
V-Victor… Where are you? I cannot see…
I…am sorry…Victoria…
Nonsense! Open your eyes, Victor!
I will not permit you to die before me!
With Victor gone, my treatment will stop.
The next fit I have will be my last.
So with the short time I have left…
I’d like nothing more than to crush you all!
Victoria… We have lost her…
My sole reason for living, gone…
Heh, ah ha ha. Then there is nothing else for it…

I shall end this miserable life…
and take you all with me!
Victor… Do not…leave me…alone…
Thank you…for killing me…
Now Victoria…and I…
shall be together…for eternity…
Bah ha ha! Ze great Ciggma Khint…
Former commander of Eternia’s occupation…

Reduced to a lowly bodyguard to pay for his
daughter’s treatments.
How far ze…mighty fall…
He had his chance to share in ze spoils.
But zat boat sailed fifteen years past…
Treatments? Bah! What a…bald-faced…
Forgive me…Father…
Victor!
Thank…you… Victor…

That swordsmanship…
It is a mirror to Kamiizumi’s own.
Then…you are [PCF2]!
Aieeeeee!
Mephilia! You’ve done enough. Withdraw!
Mephilia not die. You run, you live.
I suppose I’ve…no choice but retreat.
Awwwrrr!
Artemia! It’s too much for you! Fall back!
Enough, Artemia! You’d best retreat!
Hate retreat…but Artemia go.
Hngh! How is this possible!?
Einheria, please, you must retreat!
Einheria not die. You run, you live.
…You’ve grown strong, [PCF2].
My fira will… I’ll s-see you burn…
Hrrgh… Pesky mortals…heh heh heh.
We first met on that precipice overlooking the Great Chasm.
You had come forth from the chasm’s depths.
But you had only just slain us! Our blood had yet to dry!
Indeed, you have served me well.
Now, die a bitter death knowing you served your enemy!
…Unacceptable!!
I’ll never forgive you for violating [PCF1]’s trust!
Always the same. Always about [PCF1].
I hate that about you most of all!
My father and Master Kamiizumi warned us of you.
Now, too late, I see the fool I’ve been.
Those who act by emotion are the easiest to master.
I pity your father.
To know of me, only to be thwarted by his own daughter.
I ought have seen through you sooner…
I knew of your evils! I ought have…
You style yourself a hero? Arrogance!
You did nothing but stand in awe of my might!
Rgh! I… I…!
Quite tenacious, aren’t we?
But all your efforts shall be in vain!
You mortals shall know your place!
This isn’t what happens…
How… How are they different from the last?
Warriors of light, bah! Mere mortals! Pawns!
You shall pay dearly for this defiance!
Ah, how sublime this flesh. Such magnificence!
What are you talking about?
The pattern on my wings…
It heralds the beginning!
I have attained a perfect form!
So those were numbers!
Ahh, yes. You’ve borne witness the longest.
Heh he heh… Ha ha ha ha ha!
From your hiding place in the shadows, frozen in fear.
A lowly worm, too cowardly to save the one you loved.
Rgh!
…Airy…you…you…
Everyone…I’m…
Again… Again, I couldn’t…
Ha ha ha, pesky mortals.
We first met on that precipice overlooking the Great Chasm.
You had come forth from the chasm’s depths.
But you had only just slain us! Our blood had yet to dry!
Indeed, you have served me well.
Now, die a bitter death knowing you served your enemy!
…Unacceptable!!
I’ll never forgive you for violating [PCF1]’s trust!
Always the same. Always about [PCF1].
I hate that about you most of all!
My father and Master Kamiizumi warned us of you.
Now, too late, I see the fool I’ve been.
Those who act by emotion are the easiest to master.
I pity your father.
To know of me, only to be thwarted by his own daughter.
I ought have seen through you sooner…
I knew of your evils! I ought have…
You style yourself a hero? Arrogance!
You did nothing but stand in awe of my might!
Rgh! I…!
Quite tenacious, aren’t we?
But all your efforts shall be in vain!
You mortals shall know your place!
This isn’t what happens…
How… How are they different from the last?
Warriors of light, bah! Mere mortals! Pawns!
You shall pay dearly for this defiance!
Wh-what’s this!?
My Lord, I am forever in your debt!
Lord Ouroboros, I beseech You!
Ha ha ha ha! I am invincible!
Lord Ouroboros, I must call on You—
What? You’re…tired of me?
No, Your Malevolence. Please! Lord Ourob—
Hmm… Cumbersome indeed is the mortal form.
What’s this? Have you lost heart?
This is but child’s play.
I grow bored.
Hrm…!
Hmm, a portion of my power is sealed…
You are a formidable meal.
Impressive. But what of this?
Ha ha ha! Another world has been annihilated!
Heh heh heh, yet another world gone forever.
How does it feel to fail, young warriors of light?
No! Stop!
Foolish mortals. You’ve yet to understand.
There is but one way for you to save those worlds.

Lay down your weapons and bow before me.
Offer yourselves willingly.

Only then shall the remaining worlds be spared.
Ha ha ha!
…stop…this…
Impudent morsels… Still you resist me?
You are too late! Behold!
The Celestial Realm! Ha ha ha ha ha!

I shall bring chaos and destruction upon
the world of the gods!
All of creation will know its end!
Then I shall make it anew…in my own image!
Now, die! Begone, feeble warriors of light!
All the…Celestial Realm…
And all therein shall know my power…my terror…
Mark…my…words…
Arrghawwwaaarrrrrr!!
You seem to be enjoying yourselves.
Master!?
Nobutsuna. It’s been too long.
Forgive my intrusion upon the family reunion.
…Might I join in the fun, Braev?

Heh heh, as you like.
You’re family as much as any other.
You honor me.
Well, [PCF2]? May I?
Yes, please, Master!

Hm hm…
Swordmaster Kamiizumi stands before you!
Enjoying yourself, Braev? …Braev?
Thank you, Father. Thank you, Alternis.
Oh, Master Kamiizumi! What brings you here?
What…brings me…?
Argh!

I wanted to battle with you and Braev, but…
but you…
You half-wit, you finished too soon!
Ack!?
B-Bahamut!
F-f-flee! You’ve done enough, boy!
Fiends! Your f-f…FOE is right here!
Somebody need some help!?
Who are you?
On second thought, run away!
What I do…I do for the good of…the people.

Behold the joined might of
the Knights of the Eternian Sky!

Arrrgh!
The mighty Barras, defeated by these children!?
Fall back, you stubborn fool! That’s an order!
…Uppity little things, aren’t they?
Retreat, Holly! Save yourself, woman!
Aaaaaagh!

Augh, out of the way!
If you’re going to die, do it somewhere else!
Arrrgh!
Captain, I’ll take it from here. F-fall back!

A gnat hits harder than that!
Strike me, tiny bug children!
Your ambitions will be dashed upon my rocky abs!

Oh, come now!
It’ll take more than that to stop me!
Hmph! Off come the kid gloves!
Eep! Yowch! Y-you’ll pay for that!
Heh hee hee! Now you’ll burn…BURN!
Heh, is that all you have? All I feel is a slight breeze.
Raaaaaah!
Gah hah hah! Blood…boiled. Muscles…danced…

Hm hmm. Better to go out in a blaze
than slowly fade away.
M-my…firaga…

You withstood its f-ff…flames. Heh heh…
Cheeky brats…
Magnificent… Milady has…grown strong.
Eternian Forces, Second Division…
Khamer & Profiteur Merchantry, to battle!
Augh!
Go, Jackal. You’ve done enough.
Gah! I’ll not fall to zese proletarians!
You just did! Now stand down and make room for us!
Nngh… Seems it ends here.
Ci-Ciggma!? I command you! Fall back!
I…I must…hasten to…the duchy…
You’re in my way, old man! Move!
…This is thirsty work. My throat’s all daggers…
I’ll teach you lot…some…respect!

…Are we done yet?
Hurry up and name your price.
I’m not ready to be leaving all my money just yet!
…This blood-soaked body knows no regrets!
Not yet. I’ll not end here!
Eeaaagh! Minions, protect me!
Onward! For Anticrystalism and Eternia!
Chief, I…I gave it my best…
So, what happens to my assets now?
You fight well, but now I must bid you farewell.
The duchy needs me! I’ll not end here…
Sister, raise battle call!
Me? But…!
…Be my guest. But make it sound impressive.
Oh, um… Eternian Forces, Third Division…
Bloodrose Legion…! To battle!
Ngh… Arrows gone, bow broken…
Artemia! Retreat!
Eeeeeek!
Mephilia done enough! You run!
Aaaaaah!
Fall back, beautiful. Don’t be stubborn, now.
Oh! That hurts!
…Lame, weak, hard on eyes. Old man retreat!
Artemia love to fight, live to fight!

… … …
Still…still fight more!
I never let a little bad luck stand in my way!
Suleiman…watch over me!
You shall not lay a hand on my sisters! Not a finger!

My spear was honed beneath the swordmaster.
It shall not waver!
Woof, I’m getting too old for this.

Heh heh… I can go all night.
I’ve got a reputation to keep.
Artemia, satisfied!
I’m done with this. Goodbye.

…Such difficult sisters.
Come, let us return home.
Old Red needs a break. Anyone care to join me?

Hayreddin Barbarossa,
First Mate of the Black Blades…
First Division of the Eternian Forces!
Till such time as our captain returns, you’ll face me.
Now fight, you scallywags!
Yarrgh! I can take no more!
All brawn and no brains. Clear the way, you oaf!
Ack! No, my performance has only just begun!
Exit, stage left! Know when to bow out, lass!
Gaaah! I’ll not die here… I’m pulling back!
Kikyo, retreat! Retreat now!
Heh, well done. To think this day would ever come.
Captain, it’s time! You’ve done enough!
Captain, please! Retreat!
Bah, hurry up and fall back, already!
Gah heh heh! Is that the best you’ve got!?
I don’t think so, my little friends!
Scarcely felt that one. Barely a scratch!
Wounds such as these are nothing for my miracle salves!
Ohhh, rude! You big meanie!
Everyone, all together now! A-one and a-two…!
The battle’s end is nowhere in sight!
Foolish child! Did you expect it to end so easily?
Ha hah! I stand in awe of your battle skills!
Mm heh heh. Not much left in the salve jar, so to speak.
Let’s just skip the encore, shall we?
So, this is it. The rest is up to Braev now!
Pardon my delay. …!? Barbarossa!
Pardon my delay. …!? Qada!
Pardon my delay. …!? Praline!
Pardon my delay. …!? Kikyo!
Pardon my delay. …!? We are down this many already!?
Having fun, without me? Make room, make room!
Sage… I trust you to contain yourself…
Dreary as it is, I prefer my castle standing.
We’re within the asterisk barrier. Absolutely impervious!
…In theory, at least. Hm hm hm!
What!?
Hmm, stronger even than I’d expected. I leave them to you.
Oh? That was fast. Starting to show your age?
Agh! I’m done for… The old…flat foot…acting up…!
Welp, nothing for it but to run!

Good luck handling the rest, Your Lordship!
Hoo ho ho ho!
First he barges in, then he leaves early…
Capricious as ever…
It will take far more than that to make me kneel!
How intriguing… You do not fail to amuse!

You wouldn’t harm an old man, would you?
Wait, you just did!
Do not think you’ll vanquish me with the likes of that!
Ha ha ha ha, a fine battle. Truly.
…I have met my match. Farewell!
Aaagh! Zis cannot be…
Ugh, Profiteur! That was pathetic!
Nngh! …They’re formidable. I must withdraw!
Hurry up and get back, frills!
Agh! I messed that up good!
Bah, zis is no place for children!
I’m still in this one! See, I’m fine!
Zese rats are more persistent zan I had expected.
I can still fly! For Lord Marshal and duchy!
Heh. It’s always me alone in the end.
Ze job of ze vanguard is done…

You’ve grown strong, [PCF2].
I almost forgot it was you.
Aaagh! The iron wall is broken!
Fall back, Captain! I’ll make these scum pay!
Nngh!? Such brilliant swordsmanship…
Stand back, swordmaster. I’ll take it from here!
Kikyo, retreat! I’ll tolerate no needless death!
Just lovely… Looks like I slipped up.
Fall back, Holly! I’m not listening to Barras blubber!
You cheeky little—! No greenhorn is taking me down!
What joy! Your growth far outstrips what I had imagined.
…I will fight to the end for those who accepted me…!
You people would get all hot and bothered over this!
Heh heh. A brilliant victory on your part!
Go now, [PCF2], and never look back!
To fight to the bitter end… I feel nothing save joy…!
Phew, it’s finally over. You lot aren’t half bad.
Aww… I was almost to my best part!
That’s curtains, lass! You’ll sing another day!
Huh!? What am I doing on the ground?
Barras! Fall back for now!
Argh, but…[PCF2]! I still haven’t…!
Eek, are you alright!?
Gah hah hah! A fine mess I made of that!
Please, Barbarossa, you must retreat!
Watch out! I still have songs to sing…dances to dance!
Rraaagh! Do you see these pecs!? They’re on fire!
I’ll not fail the grand marshal! I won’t!
Together we fight! Rally to me!
Whew, did that feel good! I’m fresh out of songs!
Oh, yeah. Nothing better than fighting to your last breath.
Let this be the momentum that moves you ever forward!
The sea…she’s calling me! You hear me, Suleiman?
Ho ho! I’m getting careless in my old age.
Sage, please, fall back!
How dare you? Insolent f-fools, all of you!
Alright. If you’re done here, clear the way.
Rrgh! Did I use the wrong salve?
Ugh, gross! Out of my way if you’re done!
Eeeeeeeeek! Einheria…!
Don’t overdo it, now. It’s terrible for the complexion.
You mean little rascals. It’s not nice to bully old folk.
I still haven’t p-pulled my best spells out of my hat…
Careful now, you are all using far too much MP.
Is that hope soaring down from the sky? Or perhaps it’s…

Was that their plan?
Leave the old man to be worked to death?
Gah! Where’d everyone go!? This is…insubordination…
Not a component left. Ahh…feels good…
……I know my…sister would be proud.
This is no fun at all…
Stand back and let the grown-ups handle this!
So, it ends here…
If you’ve lost the stomach to fight, stand down, Khint!
Hmm, a most spectacular failure…
Retreat! I’ll handle matters from here.
Heh… This isn’t old Red’s finest moment.
I agree! Now move your miserable carcass out of my way!
I won’t be bested by the likes of the vestal!
How long has it been since I could fight with such abandon?
I suppose the eldest here ought to pick up a bit more slack.
I’m far from sated… If you know what I mean.
How strange. I feel a little…refreshed.
I fought to my fullest. I have no regrets.

Impressive. I even felt a pang of envy for you mortals.
Just a bit, mind you.
Aw, you lot are no fun at all.
Ngh! The rest is in your hands, Lord Khamer.
In my hands!? I shall do my best, my good doctor!
And here I had just begun to enjoy myself…
Lord Marshal, be prudent. You must retreat.
Ow!
Down, girl! Home, Artemia!
I’ve…failed to meet…the grand marshal’s…expectations…
… Loser, run. In Artemia’s way.
This will not do. I can afford no further blunders.
I have plenty of fight left! I shall not fall!
Rawr rawr!
I am Time Mage Khamer, king! Know your place!
(I…I…fought to the end…Father…)
So, it’s come to this. …Well done!
[PCF2], Artemia want rematch, someday.
I was the last sentinel standing. The very…last…
We shall be ze first to be fighting you!
The air…it’s choked with evil.
Ha ha ha ha haa! Don’t you recognize me?
It’s your old friend Airy, boy!
And after all the worlds we linked as one…
All the battles we fought together!
You’ve seen too much not to understand.
The world is not a singular existence.
An endless array of Luxendarcs exist at once.
An infinite line of worlds in parallel…
That’s obvious enough by now.
And in piercing the walls that divide them, I’ve gained power.
Power beyond the reckoning of mortals.
Enough to bring about a grand and final end…
To trigger the catastrophe!
I owe you a great deal, my friends.
For my power alone could not have broken the world-walls.
Not without the aid of the crystals set to rampage!
Then the Great Chasm… That’s your doing!
Please, don’t be modest.
Or have you forgotten your contribution?
The lot of you were eager to assist.
We tore that void open together.

And siphoned through an army of monsters
from the nether what’s more.

I’m sure the locals were less than thrilled…
Ha ha ha ha ha!
You lied to us!
And you made it so easy.
A fine pack of puppets, you lot.
Not a thought of your own, so eager to obey.
Because obeying is so easy, hmm?

You’re never responsible when you’re only
following orders.
And who would doubt what seems so obvious?
Who bears the courage to disobey?
Precious few. Not one human in a thousand.
Now, my lambs, to slaughter.
